lead_profile_text: Renovated 3-bed on market ~1 year. Two failed sales. Sandy, Bedfordshire. Mortgage £1,300/mo. STL net £24,838/yr. LTL £18,000/yr. Setup £15,600. Special offer applied; offer expired May 2026 with no response.
emotional_profile: Financially pragmatic. Wants to make property work while on market. Offer expired May 2026 with no response to follow-up attempts.
lost_reason: No response after offer expired May 2026

top_objections.text: Financial viability — does STL income cover all costs?
top_objections.zac_response: STL net £24,838/yr clearly covers £1,300/mo mortgage plus bills

top_questions.text: Will STL income cover mortgage and running costs?
top_questions.answer: Yes — STL net £24,838/yr exceeds £1,300/mo mortgage and annual bills
Standard 6-month minimum with 3-month notice; early termination available

what_moved_them: Property clearly profitable after all costs
13% discounted management offer with 1 May deadline

conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Re-engage with refreshed offer or updated projections

offer_framing: 13% management fee if signed by 1 May 2026. Special offer expiry email sent 1 May 2026.
zac_income_intro: STL net £24,838/yr vs LTL £18,000/yr — clear STL advantage covering all costs
